title: Lineage Chain
description: Schema for a complete lineage chain tracing a data element from GCP source ingestion through all pipeline transformations to its current canonical state.

detail_id.description: Canonical detail ID this chain traces.

source_record_id.description: Original GCP source record identifier at the start of the chain.

chain_length.description: Number of events in the chain.

hash_chain_valid.description: Whether the hash chain is continuous (output[N] == input[N+1]).

events.description: Ordered list of lineage events from source to current state.

first_event.description: Summary of the first event in the chain (ingestion).

last_event.description: Summary of the most recent event in the chain.

total_duration_ms.description: Total elapsed time from first to last event.

slices_traversed.description: Ordered list of slices the data passed through.

assembled_at.description: Timestamp when this chain view was assembled.

related_artifact_ids.description: Artifact IDs associated with this lineage chain.
